name: All-Day Beans
recipeIngredient: 6 beef bouillon cubes, or chicken bouillon cubes
2 teaspoons dried crushed red chili peppers
2 teaspoons garlic powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and discard any blemished beans.
2. In a heavy saucepan or slow cooker with a capacity of 3 to 4 quarts, bring water to a boil.
3. Add in the beans and cook briskly for 2 minutes. Turn off heat and cover; let soak for 1 hour.
4. Add onion, garlic, crushed chilies, bouillon cubes, and salt pork (if using). Bring mixture back to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce heat to its lowest setting and simmer tightly covered until tender, about 5 hours and 30 minutes. Add water as necessary and adjust seasoning with salt if desired.
This dish pairs well with hamburgers or barbecue and can be served in bowls topped with salsa.
